meaning: n.乌卢刀(爱斯基摩妇女传统使用的一种刀片呈新月状的刀)
examples: Registration is required at Ulu Pandan CC Counter or Wellness Centre.
After collecting a sample of fresh spatter, a geologist is silhouetted against a fountain of molten lava spouting from Hawaii's Mauna Ulu.
Sultan Ulu came as a refugee with her family after the Russian invasion of Afghanistan.
When Sultan Ulu teaches English to her class at a private school in, she says she doesn't just teach English.
